introSection: Wild Train was a steel roller coaster located at Fantasiana in Strasswalchen, Salzburg, Austria. It closed on 31 October 2024 to make way for the Mack Rides Stryker Coaster Helios.
fullText: Wild Train was a steel roller coaster located at Fantasiana in Strasswalchen, Salzburg, Austria. It closed on 31 October 2024 to make way for the Mack Rides Stryker Coaster Helios.
